input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.3.7
            TITLE: pressure relief valves must not have line of sight to the driver, with the firewall installed or

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.3.7: Pressure relief valves must not have line of sight to the driver, with the Firewall installed or
EV.4.3.7 Pressure relief valves must not have line of sight to the driver, with the Firewall installed or 
removed

final_answer: Pressure relief valves must not have line of sight to the driver, with the Firewall installed or removed
